hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Baantonmai Farmstay in Ban Mai Ngae offers family rooms with garden views. Each room features air-conditioning, a balcony, and a private bathroom equipped with a bidet.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy free on-site private parking, a washing machine, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator and electric kettle. Additional amenities include a dining area, TV, and free toiletries.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental and Asian breakfast is served daily, providing a variety of options to start the day.
Convenient Location: Located 3 km from Mae Hong Son Airport, the farm stay offers easy access to local attractions. Highly rated by guests, Baantonmai Farmstay ensures a pleasant stay.
